tagline: CLI for the Ghost Layer dual-chain XRPL/Base toll gateway
description: ghost-layer-pp-cli is a Go CLI generated by CLI Printing Press (printing-press-library) for the Ghost Layer proprietary dual-chain XRPL/Base toll gateway. Provides commands for health checks, browsing the x402 product catalog, generating payment quotes, dispensing products post-payment, executing cross-chain bridge settlements, viewing agent stats and loyalty tiers, and inspecting the 54-block Cube execution matrix.

commands.description: Health check — confirms Ghost Layer service is live
List all purchasable x402 products available through Ghost Layer
Get payment quote + XRPL destination address + memo_hex for a product
Dispense a product after XRPL payment has been confirmed
Execute a cross-chain settlement between XRPL and Base
View agent stats, loyalty tier, and Passport level for an XRPL wallet
Inspect the 54-block Cube execution matrix snapshot

recommended_agent_flow: ghost-layer x402 quote --product routing.telemetry --wallet rXXX (→ returns pay_to + memo_hex + amount)
Pay on XRPL: send RLUSD to pay_to address with memo_hex as MemoData
ghost-layer agent rXXX (check loyalty tier earned)

environment_variables.GHOST_LAYER_WALLET: Your XRPL wallet (rXXX...) — sent as X-Agent-Wallet header

gateway_products.name: Agent Kiosk
gateway_products.description: AI agent vending machine with X-Grace-Tip auction

gateway_products.name: Signal Auction Loom
gateway_products.description: Real-time WebGL market signal auction visualizer
